reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) The YPF gas stations were generally very helpful when we were in Argentina!! Attentive employees, when our cell phone SIM cards weren't working they gave us the internet password... There was a mention in Zapala where a guy at the gas station even helped us find accommodation... It's a shame I forgot the guy's name...

(Original)
Os postos YPF foram no geral de grande valia quando estivemos na Argentina!! Funcionários atenciosos, quando os nós Chips nós celulares não funcionavam eles nos passavam a senha da internet...Teve uma citação em Zapala que um moço do posto até ajudou para encontrar hospedagem... Uma pena que Esqueci o nome do rapaz..
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10539008023529743134/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSbXFXenR3RRAB
